items.name: Grand Dégustation
items.description: An eight-course journey through our chef's finest creations, paired with sommelier-curated wines from our 2,000-bottle cellar.

items.name: Menu Découverte
items.description: Five thoughtfully composed courses celebrating the season's finest produce, a perfect introduction to our culinary philosophy.

items.name: Foie Gras Poêlé
items.description: Pan-seared duck foie gras, Sauternes reduction, brioche toast, Granny Smith apple compote, micro herbs.

items.name: Carpaccio de Saint-Jacques
items.description: Scottish hand-dived scallops, yuzu vinaigrette, caviar, cucumber water, edible flowers, gold leaf.

items.name: Soupe à la Truffe Noire
items.description: Black Périgord truffle velouté, artisan cream, crispy pancetta, chive oil, puff pastry dome.

items.name: Tartare de Langoustine
items.description: Norwegian langoustine tartare, avocado mousseline, tomato water jelly, crispy quinoa, dill oil.

items.name: Filet de Bœuf Rossini
items.description: 28-day dry-aged Wagyu beef tenderloin, pan-seared foie gras, black truffle sauce, potato dauphinoise, haricots verts.

items.name: Homard Thermidor
items.description: Whole Nova Scotia lobster, cognac cream sauce, Gruyère gratin, tarragon butter, seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Pigeon en Croûte de Sel
items.description: Whole roasted squab in herb salt crust, foie gras stuffing, morel mushroom jus, roasted root vegetables.

items.name: Sole Meunière Classique
items.description: Whole Dover sole, brown butter, capers, lemon, parsley, pommes vapeur, watercress salad.

items.name: Soufflé au Chocolat Valrhona
items.description: Warm 70% Valrhona dark chocolate soufflé, Madagascar vanilla ice cream, praline tuile. Please allow 20 minutes.

items.name: Mille-Feuille Caramel Beurre Salé
items.description: Caramelised puff pastry, Brittany salted caramel cream, crystallised violets, tonka bean ice cream.

items.name: Île Flottante Revisitée
items.description: Cloud-light meringue island, crème anglaise, caramel lace, pink praline, orange blossom water.
